masthead.dek: Twenty 'best-without' questions. Each names a famous crown that nobody here ever won — then asks who did the most, came closest, or loomed largest without it. Cross off every champion, and find the best of the rest. Narrow the field, place your bet, then tap to check.
masthead.footer_html: Twenty consolation-crown slicers across sport, geography, and culture — every fact web-verified and sourced. Records as of 2024-25.

dimensions: most populous non-host of the Olympics
most NFL wins, no Super Bowl
most Eurovision entries, no win
most NBA wins, no title
largest country never in a World Cup
biggest film franchise, no Oscar nod
most English titles, no European Cup
most populous country, no woman leader
most Best Picture noms, no win
most World Cups, never won
largest economy, no permanent UNSC seat
most foreign-film Oscar noms, no win
most Cup Finals, no Stanley Cup
most populous country, no one in space
biggest animated franchise, no Oscar win
most Women's World Cup podiums, no title

most Olympic medals, no gold
most populous country, no UNESCO site
plan.note: A themed set entirely on the best-without slicer ('most A among those that never B'). The unifying archetype is intentional; variety comes from rotating arenas (sport, geography, culture) and answer domains (franchises, leagues, countries, studios). Answers reuse from other library sets (India, China, Japan, Mexico, Cyprus, etc.) — allowed, since only QUESTIONS must be unique. Difficulty climbs roughly easy -> hard.

questions.dimension: most populous non-host of the Olympics
questions.q: What is the most populous country in the world that has never hosted the Summer Olympic Games?
questions.detail: India has about 1.45 billion people (2024) and has never hosted a Summer Olympics.
questions.why: Its roughly 1.45 billion people dwarf every other never-host; the next-biggest are well under 300 million.
questions.more: Africa as a whole has also never hosted the Games; all Asian Olympics have been in East Asia.
questions.source: Wikipedia 'List of Olympic Games host cities'; topendsports host-country list.

questions.dimension: most NFL wins, no Super Bowl
questions.q: Among NFL teams that have never won a Super Bowl, which franchise has piled up the most regular-season wins in its history?
questions.detail: The Vikings have roughly 516 regular-season wins yet are 0-4 in Super Bowls.
questions.why: They reached four Super Bowls (1970s) and lost them all, while topping every never-winner in total victories.
questions.more: The Buffalo Bills also lost four Super Bowls, but trail the Vikings in all-time wins.
questions.source: ESPN 'Which NFL teams have never won a Super Bowl'; franchise records.

questions.dimension: most Eurovision entries, no win
questions.q: Among countries that have competed in the Eurovision Song Contest but never won it, which has entered the most times?
questions.detail: Cyprus has entered 42 times since 1981 without a win — the longest such streak.
questions.why: 42 appearances and zero wins is the most of any country still seeking its first.
questions.more: Its best result was second in 2018 with Eleni Foureira's 'Fuego.'
questions.source: Wikipedia 'Cyprus in the Eurovision Song Contest' (as of 2024).

questions.dimension: most NBA wins, no title
questions.q: Which NBA franchise has piled up the most regular-season wins in its history without ever winning a championship?
questions.detail: The Suns have roughly 2,510 regular-season wins across 58 seasons and zero titles.
questions.why: Phoenix has reached three NBA Finals (1976, 1993, 2021) and lost them all.
questions.more: The Sacramento Kings have more wins but are excluded — they won the 1951 title as the Rochester Royals.
questions.source: ESPN 'Which NBA teams have never won a championship'; Basketball-Reference.

questions.dimension: largest country never in a World Cup
questions.q: What is the largest country by land area whose men's soccer team has never qualified for a World Cup?
questions.detail: Kazakhstan covers about 2.72 million sq km and has never qualified for a men's World Cup.
questions.why: It is the 9th-largest country on Earth and the biggest never to reach the tournament — every larger country has qualified at least once.
questions.more: It is also the world's largest landlocked country, bigger than all of Western Europe combined.
questions.source: Mappr 'World's Largest Countries'; lists of nations never to qualify.

questions.dimension: biggest film franchise, no Oscar nod
questions.q: What is the highest-grossing film franchise that has never received even a single Academy Award nomination?
questions.detail: The Fast & Furious films have grossed about $7.3 billion worldwide with zero Oscar nominations in any category.
questions.why: At ~$7.3 billion it is the biggest-earning series the Academy has completely ignored.
questions.more: 'Furious 7' alone made about $1.5 billion in 2015.
questions.source: Deadline ($7B milestone); IndieWire on its Oscar shutout (as of 2024).

questions.dimension: most English titles, no European Cup
questions.q: Which English club has won the most English league titles but has never lifted the European Cup or Champions League?
questions.detail: Arsenal have won 13 English league titles yet never Europe's top club trophy.
questions.why: With 13 league crowns and a record 14 FA Cups, their only European Cup/Champions League final ended in a 2006 loss to Barcelona.
questions.more: They also lost the 2019 Europa League final, leaving them without UEFA's two biggest club prizes.
questions.source: UEFA Champions League winners list; Wikipedia 'Arsenal F.C. in European football'.

questions.dimension: most populous country, no woman leader
questions.q: What is the most populous country that has never had a woman serve as its head of government or head of state?
questions.detail: China (about 1.41 billion) has never had a woman as head of state or government.
questions.why: Its roughly 1.41 billion people make it the most populous such country, ahead of the United States.
questions.more: India had Indira Gandhi as prime minister back in 1966; Bangladesh has been led by women for most of three decades.
questions.source: UN Women 2024 (113 countries never with a woman head of state); news coverage.

questions.dimension: most Best Picture noms, no win
questions.q: Which film studio or distributor has earned the most Best Picture nominations at the Oscars without ever winning the award?
questions.detail: Netflix has earned about a dozen Best Picture nominations since 'Roma' (2019) without a win.
questions.why: Around 12 Best Picture nods and no win is the most for any distributor still seeking its first.
questions.more: Apple TV+ beat it to the milestone, winning Best Picture with 'CODA' in 2022.
questions.source: What's-on-Netflix Oscar history; GoldDerby.

questions.dimension: most World Cups, never won
questions.q: Which country has played in more men's World Cups than any other nation that has never won the tournament?
questions.detail: Mexico has reached 18 World Cups and holds the record for most World Cup matches played without ever winning.
questions.why: Across all those tournaments its best finishes are two home quarter-finals (1970, 1986).
questions.more: The Netherlands is the most painful near-miss among never-winners, with three runner-up finishes.
questions.source: FIFA Mexico profile; Wikipedia 'FIFA World Cup records and statistics.'

questions.dimension: largest economy, no permanent UNSC seat
questions.q: What is the largest national economy that has never held a permanent seat on the UN Security Council?
questions.detail: Japan, with GDP around $4 trillion, has never been one of the five permanent Security Council members.
questions.why: Its economy is the largest of any non-permanent-member country; the only bigger economies, the US and China, both hold permanent seats.
questions.more: Japan has been elected a non-permanent member 12 times, more than any other UN state.
questions.source: IMF/World Bank GDP rankings; Japan MOFA UN pages.

questions.dimension: most foreign-film Oscar noms, no win
questions.q: Which country has been nominated the most times for the Best International Feature Oscar (the foreign-language award) without ever winning it?
questions.detail: Israel has 10 nominations in the category — the most of any country that has never won.
questions.why: Ten nominations and no win is the record for a country shut out of the category.
questions.more: Its first nod was 'Sallah Shabati' (1964); its most recent was 'Footnote' (2011).
questions.source: Wikipedia 'List of Israeli submissions for the Academy Award...'.

questions.dimension: most Cup Finals, no Stanley Cup
questions.q: Among NHL teams that have never won the Stanley Cup, which franchise has reached the Stanley Cup Final the most times?
questions.detail: The Sabres are 0-2 in Stanley Cup Finals (1975 and 1999), the most Final trips by a franchise that has never won.
questions.why: Both Finals ended in defeat — the 1999 loss sealed by Brett Hull's disputed triple-overtime 'No Goal.'
questions.more: Vancouver also has multiple Final losses without a Cup.
questions.source: champsorchumps Sabres championships; The Hockey Writers.

questions.dimension: most populous country, no one in space
questions.q: What is the most populous country that has never sent one of its own citizens into space?
questions.detail: Indonesia (about 285 million) has never had a citizen reach space; a 1986 Shuttle mission for one was canceled after the Challenger disaster.
questions.why: Its roughly 285 million people make it the most populous nation never to fly someone to space.
questions.more: Smaller Brazil has done it — Marcos Pontes reached the ISS in 2006.
questions.source: Worldometer 2024 populations; Smithsonian on spacefaring nations.

questions.dimension: biggest animated franchise, no Oscar win
questions.q: What is the highest-grossing animated film franchise that has never won an Academy Award?
questions.detail: The Despicable Me/Minions franchise has grossed over $5 billion — the biggest animated franchise ever — with no Oscar wins.
questions.why: It is the only animated franchise past $5 billion, and it has zero statues.
questions.more: 'Despicable Me 2' was nominated for Best Animated Feature in 2014 but lost to 'Frozen.'
questions.source: NBCUniversal/Deadline ($5B, biggest animated franchise); awards lists.

questions.dimension: most Women's World Cup podiums, no title
questions.q: Which country has finished on the Women's World Cup podium the most times without ever winning the tournament?
questions.detail: Sweden have five podium finishes — runner-up in 2003 plus third in 1991, 2011, 2019, and 2023 — and have played in all nine editions, but never won.
questions.why: Five podiums (one silver, four bronze) are the most by any nation that has never lifted the trophy.
questions.more: Their closest call was the 2003 final, a 2-1 golden-goal loss to Germany.
questions.source: Wikipedia 'Sweden at the FIFA Women's World Cup.'

questions.dimension: largest country, no Olympic medal
questions.q: What is the largest country by land area that has never won a medal at the Summer Olympics?
questions.detail: The DR Congo covers about 2.34 million sq km and had never won a Summer Olympic medal as of 2024.
questions.why: At roughly 2.34 million sq km it is the 11th-largest country and the biggest never to medal.
questions.more: It is also the second most populous country ever to go without a Summer medal, behind Bangladesh.
questions.source: WorldAtlas 'Countries Who Have Never Won A Summer Olympic Medal'.

questions.dimension: most No. 2 hits, no No. 1
questions.q: Which band placed more singles at No. 2 on the Billboard Hot 100 than anyone else, while never once reaching No. 1?
questions.detail: Creedence Clearwater Revival landed five different singles at No. 2 and never had a No. 1 — the most runner-up hits without a chart-topper in Hot 100 history.
questions.why: Five No. 2 hits and zero No. 1s is the record for an act stuck one spot short.
questions.more: 'Proud Mary' and 'Bad Moon Rising' were among the five that peaked at No. 2.
questions.source: Billboard 'CCR Had Five No. 2 Hot 100 Hits Without a No. 1.'

questions.dimension: most Olympic medals, no gold
questions.q: Which country has won the most Summer Olympic medals without ever winning a single gold?
questions.detail: Malaysia has collected 15 Summer Olympic medals (8 silver, 7 bronze) through 2024 with zero golds.
questions.why: Its 15 medals are the most of any nation that has never won Olympic gold — many of them badminton silvers.
questions.more: The Philippines once led this category but broke through with weightlifting gold in Tokyo 2020.
questions.source: OlympStats 'Nations with most Olympic medals but no golds'; topendsports.

questions.dimension: most populous country, no UNESCO site
questions.q: What is the most populous country that does not have a single UNESCO World Heritage Site?
questions.detail: South Sudan (about 11 million) had no inscribed World Heritage Site as of 2024; it joined the convention only in 2016.
questions.why: Its roughly 11 million people make it the most populous country with zero sites, ahead of Sierra Leone and Liberia.
questions.more: It has placed three properties on its 'tentative list' but none are inscribed yet.
questions.source: UNESCO whc.unesco.org country pages; WorldAtlas.
